reviews.review_description: After creating an account I received access to three more training scenarios – toddler near a swimming pool, a child near a swimming pool, and a child in a classroom. It’s great to see different emergency situations.

reviews.review_title: I was surprised how good it is
reviews.review_description: After registering in the app I realized the basic training was actually free, which was a nice surprise. The registration unlocked three additional training scenarios, which made the whole experience much more comprehensive.
Great way to learn CPR in virtual reality. The instructions are clear and the simulation feels very realistic. Much more engaging than watching videos.
Simple and clear CPR training in VR. Registration was quick and it unlocked three additional scenarios, which was great because it allowed practicing different child rescue situations.
never wanna play any other game again this is the best game ever
F this it made me get it
